title: lygodium cochinchinense
intro: Lygodium cochinchinense, also known as the rattan fern, is a type of climbing fern native to Asia and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lygodium cochinchinense include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and preventing certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Lygodium cochinchinense can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used to treat a range of health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
